name: codersmu-raycast
title: Coders.mu
description: Browse Coders.mu meetups and open calendar links from Raycast.
author: cedpoilly

commands.name: next-meetup
commands.title: Next Meetup
commands.subtitle: Coders.mu
commands.description: Show the current or next Coders.mu meetup.

commands.name: meetups
commands.title: Meetups
commands.subtitle: Coders.mu
commands.description: Browse upcoming and past Coders.mu meetups.

scripts.build: npm run sync:core && ray build -e dist
scripts.lint: npm run sync:core && eslint src eslint.config.mjs && prettier --check README.md CHANGELOG.md eslint.config.mjs package.json tsconfig.json src
scripts.fix-lint: npm run sync:core && eslint src eslint.config.mjs --fix && prettier --write README.md CHANGELOG.md eslint.config.mjs package.json tsconfig.json src
scripts.test: npm run sync:core && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
